lines.en: Eri
I quit being an idol, but...
Better check the trend info

Image strategy begins with
knowing the trends.
Same goes for a net idol...
Trends change day by day.
Reading the future... it's kind of fun

Sometimes it's important
to go back to basics...
Better check the trends properly
Okay... this week too, at my own pace
Let's do this...!
...Let's do everything I can.
So whatever happens, I'll be fine...
No need to do anything I hate...
I'll take it easy...
And... auditions. I should decide
whether I'll enter one or not...
My pass rate right now is...
still no good at all...
I need more lessons...
Dance is fine, but... the rest
looks tough. Even I can tell...
Vocals are fine, but... the rest
Visuals are fine, but... the rest
Just dance left. If only dance
could come together somehow...
Just vocals left. If only vocals
Just visuals left. If only visuals
Maybe lessons are enough. What's left
is making myself shine... Showtime...!
Now that I've quit being a real idol,
I'm a net idol...
Like an idol. Like myself.
I just do what I can...!
